raw_consumer_statement: I purchased a travel reservation on XX/XX/XXXX with my credit card and credit card points. I cancelled the reservation on XX/XX/XXXX and was promised a refund for the credit card total ( {$2000.00} ) within 7-14 days and the points ( {$80.00} ) within 24-48 hours. I received the credit card refund in a timely fashion, however, the credit card point refund still has not been received as of XX/XX/XXXX even though I was supposed to receive it within 2 days. Citi has been very poor with email communication and is not giving me a defined resolution ETA despite multiple requests.
